calendar.matters:
Petition For Nunc Pro Tunc Order Correcting Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Allen appeared via zoom for Charles Wibblesman (petitioner).

Mr. Allen stated that the IRA account had no beneficiaries listed. Counsel to prepare an order to include the Marketedge IRA account and send it by email to the assigned examiner in this matter. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Allen for Charles Wibblesman.

This matter was left on calendar to see if anyone would appear to object. No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Continued To Oct-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Allen appeared via zoom for Charles Wibbelsman (trustee).

Discussion was held in regard to Mr. Allen not addressing the examiners notes, that Mr. Allen to give personal notice to the two cousins Barbara Wol and Jeffrey Hyman, that the assignment not naming an assignee, and that Mr. Allen is to communicate with examiner via email. Petition for order conforming trust property is continued to October 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the matter has not been addressed a week prior to the hearing the petition will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Continued To Aug-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jul-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; James Allen appearing via zoom for Charles Wibblesman (petitioner).

Mr. Allen stated that the decedent had no children, that the parents are deceased, that he had no siblings, that they found two cousins in Florida and that he can notify them. Petition for order confirming trust property Is continued to July 03, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.
